notes: Added workflow guidance that design work should remove redundant local labels and fit dense layouts to the available pane before introducing forced width constraints.
Updated planner and builder prompts so tasks that change both data shape and rendering are expected to be split and tracked separately.
Extended verify outputs with an optional visual_checks contract so screenshot-backed layout checks can be recorded alongside command checks.
open_issues: Existing historical plan artifacts do not use implementation_area yet because the new field is additive rather than required.
Existing verify artifacts do not all include visual_checks because the checklist requirement is conditional on UI-affecting work.
